name: title
text: HumanML3D-Guided Teacher Selection for MoConVQ LoRA Distillation
textPreview: HumanML3D-Guided Teacher Selection for MoConVQ LoRA Distillation

name: source
text: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments
textPreview: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments

text: The new contribution is not just LoRA distillation; it is using HumanML3D motion as a teacher-selection signal.
textPreview: The new contribution is not just LoRA distillation; it is using HumanML3D motion as a teacher-selection signal.

text: HumanML3D provided captions, but its real motions were not used to choose teacher tokens.
textPreview: HumanML3D provided captions, but its real motions were not used to choose teacher tokens.

text: Generate multiple teacher candidates and select the one closest to the paired HumanML3D motion.
textPreview: Generate multiple teacher candidates and select the one closest to the paired HumanML3D motion.

text: Candidate diversity is fixed, but alignment gains are small and do not yet improve final student style proxy.
textPreview: Candidate diversity is fixed, but alignment gains are small and do not yet improve final student style proxy.

text: Top-k selected teacher HumanML alignment score.
textPreview: Top-k selected teacher HumanML alignment score.

text: Final top-k student style-proxy checks improved.
textPreview: Final top-k student style-proxy checks improved.

text: 这一页把重点拉回来：这份报告的核心不再是泛泛介绍 LoRA，而是说明我们如何让 HumanML3D 的真实 motion 参与 teacher selection。原始方法主要使用 caption，student 模仿 teacher token；新方法是在同一个 caption 下生成多个 teacher candidate，再用 HumanML3D 对应 motion 的统计特征选择更接近的 candidate。关键结论是：多候选机制已经生效，但 teacher 与 HumanML 的对齐提升还比较小，并没有直接带来最终 student style proxy 的提升。

name: title
text: The real gap: HumanML3D motion was available but underused
textPreview: The real gap: HumanML3D motion was available but underused

text: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments
textPreview: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments

text: The project started from a format mismatch, but the deeper issue is supervision quality.
textPreview: The project started from a format mismatch, but the deeper issue is supervision quality.

text: expects discrete token targets, not HumanML continuous features
textPreview: expects discrete token targets, not HumanML continuous features

text: teacher samples tokens from caption; student learns CE loss
textPreview: teacher samples tokens from caption; student learns CE loss

text: motion ground truth does not steer which teacher sample is learned
textPreview: motion ground truth does not steer which teacher sample is learned

text: Caption-only distillation can teach a plausible teacher sample even when it is not close to the paired HumanML3D motion.
textPreview: Caption-only distillation can teach a plausible teacher sample even when it is not close to the paired HumanML3D motion.

text: The new question: can HumanML3D motion help choose a better teacher target before LoRA training?
textPreview: The new question: can HumanML3D motion help choose a better teacher target before LoRA training?

text: This reframes the project from “style steering only” to “motion-aware teacher target selection.”
textPreview: This reframes the project from “style steering only” to “motion-aware teacher target selection.”

text: 这一页解释为什么要重新组织 PPT。最早的问题看起来是格式不匹配：HumanML3D 是连续动作，MoConVQ GPT 需要离散 token。但更深层的问题是监督质量：如果 teacher 只根据 caption 生成一个样本，student 学到的就是这个样本，而这个样本未必接近 HumanML3D 的真实动作。因此新方法的动机是：让 HumanML3D 的真实 motion 不只是提供 caption，而是参与选择 teacher target。

name: title
text: Original LoRA distillation learns the teacher, not the dataset motion
textPreview: Original LoRA distillation learns the teacher, not the dataset motion

name: source
text: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments
textPreview: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments

text: Student training loss is token-level cross entropy against selected teacher pseudo-tokens.
textPreview: Student training loss is token-level cross entropy against selected teacher pseudo-tokens.

text: learns selected token ids with CE / NLL
textPreview: learns selected token ids with CE / NLL

text: The training loss does not directly optimize HumanML distance, naturalness, or style-proxy score. It only asks the student to mimic the selected teacher token.
textPreview: The training loss does not directly optimize HumanML distance, naturalness, or style-proxy score. It only asks the student to mimic the s...

text: Better teacher selection is the real control point before LoRA training.
textPreview: Better teacher selection is the real control point before LoRA training.

text: 这一页讲清楚 baseline 的含义。训练 LoRA 的 loss 是 cross entropy，也可以理解为 token-level negative log likelihood。它优化的是 student 对 teacher token 的预测概率，不直接优化 HumanML motion distance，也不直接优化人类观感。因此如果 teacher target 选得不好，student 会很认真地模仿一个不一定好的目标。这里自然引出后面的方法：真正要改的是 teacher candidate selection。

name: title
text: Motion-aware teacher selection before LoRA training
textPreview: Motion-aware teacher selection before LoRA training

name: source
text: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments
textPreview: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments

text: For each HumanML3D row, generate several teacher candidates and select the one whose BVH metrics best match the paired HumanML3D motion.
textPreview: For each HumanML3D row, generate several teacher candidates and select the one whose BVH metrics best match the paired HumanML3D motion.

text: mean log-ratio distance to HumanML metrics
textPreview: mean log-ratio distance to HumanML metrics

text: The paired motion is no longer ignored; it becomes the reference profile for teacher selection.
textPreview: The paired motion is no longer ignored; it becomes the reference profile for teacher selection.

text: Student training remains compatible with the pretrained MoConVQ GPT token interface.
textPreview: Student training remains compatible with the pretrained MoConVQ GPT token interface.

text: The score ranks candidates only; LoRA still trains with CE on the selected tokens.
textPreview: The score ranks candidates only; LoRA still trains with CE on the selected tokens.

text: 这一页是新方法的核心流程。对于每一条 HumanML3D 样本，我们有 caption、motion_id 和对应真实 motion。teacher 不再只采样一次，而是用 top-k 随机采样生成多个候选。每个候选被解码成 BVH，计算运动统计，然后和该 motion_id 对应的 HumanML3D 运动统计比较，选出距离最小的 candidate。最后 student 仍然用 cross entropy 学这个被选中的 token。这样既利用了 HumanML3D motion，又保持 MoConVQ token 训练路径不变。

name: title
text: The candidate score measures closeness, not lower-is-better style
textPreview: The candidate score measures closeness, not lower-is-better style

name: source
text: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments
textPreview: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments

text: score = mean | log(candidate_metric / HumanML_metric) |   → lower is closer
textPreview: score = mean | log(candidate_metric / HumanML_metric) |   → lower is closer

text: This is different from the old style proxy. If the HumanML speed is not zero, collapsing speed to zero is penalized, not rewarded.
textPreview: This is different from the old style proxy. If the HumanML speed is not zero, collapsing speed to zero is penalized, not rewarded.

text: global speed, duration, vertical motion, and whole-body intensity.
textPreview: global speed, duration, vertical motion, and whole-body intensity.

text: fine hand actions, object-like semantics, complex dance identities, and local motion order.
textPreview: fine hand actions, object-like semantics, complex dance identities, and local motion order.

text: 这一页重点澄清 scoring。新 selection score 不是 lower-is-better 风格得分，而是接近度得分。公式是 candidate metric 和 HumanML metric 的 log ratio distance 取平均，越小表示越接近。比如 HumanML 的速度是 0.5，candidate 速度变成 0 并不会得高分，反而会因为和目标差得远而被惩罚。这套指标适合捕捉速度、时长、整体幅度、竖直起伏等全局运动特征，但不擅长捕捉手部动作、复杂舞蹈语义或动作顺序。

name: title
text: Top-k sampling makes multi-candidate selection real
textPreview: Top-k sampling makes multi-candidate selection real

name: source
text: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments
textPreview: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments

text: Before stochastic top-k sampling, multiple candidates were nearly identical. After the fix, non-first candidates were selected 86 times.
textPreview: Before stochastic top-k sampling, multiple candidates were nearly identical. After the fix, non-first candidates were selected 86 times.

text: Multiple-sample filtering almost did not matter because the teacher output was effectively deterministic.
textPreview: Multiple-sample filtering almost did not matter because the teacher output was effectively deterministic.

text: Top-k and temperature expose meaningful variation, so HumanML selection can actually choose among candidates.
textPreview: Top-k and temperature expose meaningful variation, so HumanML selection can actually choose among candidates.

text: 这一页展示第一个明确成果：原先虽然代码上生成多个 candidate，但 teacher.sample 在 if_categorial=False 时几乎确定性，200 个样本里 199 次都选第一个。这说明多候选筛选基本没有发挥作用。加入 top-k stochastic sampling 后，选择分布变成 0 号 114 次，1 号 31 次，2 号 32 次，3 号 23 次，非第一个 candidate 合计 86 次。也就是说，selection 机制终于有了真实选择空间。

name: title
text: The old style proxy and HumanML alignment answer different questions
textPreview: The old style proxy and HumanML alignment answer different questions

name: source
text: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments
textPreview: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments

text: Compares LoRA BVH against baseline BVH. It asks whether motion metrics moved in a hand-written style direction, such as slower speed for “slow deliberate”.
textPreview: Compares LoRA BVH against baseline BVH. It asks whether motion metrics moved in a hand-written style direction, such as slower speed for ...

text: Compares generated or selected BVH against the paired HumanML3D motion. It asks whether the motion statistics are close to the dataset reference.
textPreview: Compares generated or selected BVH against the paired HumanML3D motion. It asks whether the motion statistics are close to the dataset re...

text: A lower-is-better proxy can reward over-shooting, such as making speed too low.
textPreview: A lower-is-better proxy can reward over-shooting, such as making speed too low.

text: HumanML alignment penalizes both too high and too low values if they move away from the paired motion.
textPreview: HumanML alignment penalizes both too high and too low values if they move away from the paired motion.

text: 这一页解释为什么旧结果和新结果不能混在一起解读。旧 style proxy 比较的是 LoRA 和 baseline，看 LoRA 是否朝我们手写的风格方向变化；它不是在比较是否接近 HumanML3D。新 HumanML alignment 比较的是 candidate 或生成动作和对应 HumanML3D motion 的接近程度。两个指标回答的问题不同：旧指标问风格方向有没有更明显，新指标问是否更接近真实数据。

name: title
text: Top-k improves teacher alignment slightly, but not final student proxy
textPreview: Top-k improves teacher alignment slightly, but not final student proxy

name: source
text: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments
textPreview: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments

text: Old directional score: original 18/22, deterministic 15/22, top-k 12/22. This says the final student did not improve under the old proxy.
textPreview: Old directional score: original 18/22, deterministic 15/22, top-k 12/22. This says the final student did not improve under the old proxy.

text: Selected teacher distance moved from 1.9666 to 1.9419, and score from 0.1443 to 0.1477.
textPreview: Selected teacher distance moved from 1.9666 to 1.9419, and score from 0.1443 to 0.1477.

text: The teacher-selection target changed, but the final student generation objective did not yet fully inherit that improvement.
textPreview: The teacher-selection target changed, but the final student generation objective did not yet fully inherit that improvement.

text: Reading: top-k fixes the teacher-selection mechanism, but the final student result still needs paired HumanML generation evaluation.
textPreview: Reading: top-k fixes the teacher-selection mechanism, but the final student result still needs paired HumanML generation evaluation.

text: 这一页把结果讲清楚：如果用旧 style proxy，top-k 结果反而更低，只有 12/22；但如果看新 HumanML alignment，top-k selected teacher 比 deterministic selected teacher 略好，distance 从 1.9666 降到 1.9419，score 从 0.1443 升到 0.1477。这个结果不是简单失败，而是说明两个目标不同：我们确实改善了 teacher selection 的候选多样性和一点点 HumanML 对齐，但还没有证明最终 student 的生成结果也更接近 HumanML。

name: title
text: Alignment is better for global whole-body motions than local semantics
textPreview: Alignment is better for global whole-body motions than local semantics

name: source
text: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments
textPreview: Source: HumanML3D-guided MoConVQ LoRA distillation experiments

text: Clear root speed, path length, and vertical range
textPreview: Clear root speed, path length, and vertical range

text: Complex dances such as chicken dance
textPreview: Complex dances such as chicken dance

text: 这一页解释哪些样本对得上，哪些对不上。新 alignment 不是说只有部分数据有 ground truth，而是 200 条都能按 motion_id 对齐；差别在于运动统计是否真的接近。跑步、跳跃、前进这类全身运动比较容易对上，因为 root speed、path length、vertical range 能捕捉它们。挥手、拿东西、复杂舞蹈、局部动作顺序则对得差，因为当前指标主要是全局运动统计，无法充分表达局部语义。

text: The contribution is a better bridge, not a finished evaluator

textPreview: Generate baseline and LoRA BVHs from HumanML3D captions, then compare each output to the corresponding motion_id.

text: The method moves the project from caption-only pseudo-token distillation toward data-grounded teacher selection. The next experiment should close the loop at the student-output level.
textPreview: The method moves the project from caption-only pseudo-token distillation toward data-grounded teacher selection. The next experiment shou...

text: HumanML3D motion can guide teacher selection; the final student still needs paired HumanML generation evaluation.
textPreview: HumanML3D motion can guide teacher selection; the final student still needs paired HumanML generation evaluation.

text: 最后总结。现在最重要的贡献不是最终分数已经全面提升，而是建立了一个更合理的桥：HumanML3D motion 可以参与 teacher selection，top-k 机制也让这个选择真正生效。还没有解决的是最终 student 是否更接近 HumanML3D，因为目前新 alignment 主要评估 selected teacher candidate。下一步应该用 HumanML3D caption 重新生成 baseline 和 LoRA BVH，再和每个 motion_id 的真实 motion 对齐，这样才能完整评估学生模型是否真正受益。
